# Vyshnav P C - Portfolio

> Hi, I am Vyshnav — a MERN / Fullstack Developer specialising in MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure.

## About Me
I'm a MERN Stack developer who can handle everything from building solid full stack APIs to clean UIs and full deployments. I have ~2 years of production experience and am open to full-time or contract work.

## Skills
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Mongoose
- **DevOps & Cloud:** Docker, AWS, CI/CD, Nginx, Redis, RabbitMQ
- **Tools:** Git, GitHub, Postman, VS Code

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://portfolio.vyshnavpc.com/): Main portfolio page showing projects, skills, and experience.
- [Journey](https://portfolio.vyshnavpc.com/journey): A timeline of my career journey, education, and milestones.
- [DevBlog](https://portfolio.vyshnavpc.com/blogs): Articles on fullstack development, Node.js, DevOps, and software engineering.
